title: Therapy
description: A device, pharmaceutical, digital therapeutic, or procedure.

id.description: Prefix encodes therapyType: rx-=pharmaceutical, dev-=device, dig-=digital, proc-=procedure.

subtype.description: Drug class or device class, e.g. 'SGLT2 inhibitor', 'LAA closure device', 'PA pressure sensor'.

company.description: Reference to a company id. Optional (e.g. generic procedures have no maker).

treats.description: References to condition ids this therapy targets.

regulatoryDetail.description: Free-text specifics, e.g. 'FDA approved 2021; CE mark 2020'.

pulse.description: Newsworthiness / attention score, 0-10 (10 = most recent coverage). Maintained by the update routine; drives label font size in the graph. Omit if unscored.
